stepAnswer: No $$-$$ theories and laws are fundamentally different kinds of statements and do not transform into one another.
stepBody: Can a scientific theory ever become a scientific law?
choices: Yes $$-$$ if enough evidence accumulates, a theory is promoted to a law.
No $$-$$ theories and laws are fundamentally different kinds of statements and do not transform into one another.
Yes $$-$$ but only after $$100$$ years of consistent results.
No $$-$$ because theories are always less reliable than laws.
